output:
Aggregated execute batches: completed 4/4.
Batch 1: Batch 6 executed. T14 was verified against the current worktree and T15 removed the last legacy clip-to-group track-sync helper by rerouting remaining track-move callers through group-level mutations. Relevant full test files passed, and the batch checkpoint was refreshed.
Batch 2: Batch 7 executed as a verification-focused pass over T16. The existing video-editor test files already matched the first-class pinned-group model, the full T16 module suite passed on rerun, and the batch checkpoint was refreshed.
Batch 3: Batch 8 validation completed. The ordered pinned-group verification gates passed, `npx tsc --noEmit` passed, the full `src/tools/video-editor/` Vitest suite passed in this worktree, and the throwaway repro script confirmed cohesion holds across legacy migration, drag, resize, and sync-style child replacement before being deleted.
Batch 4: Batch 9 final verification completed. The project test entrypoint `npm test` was rerun and currently fails outside the video-editor refactor surface, while the direct pinned-group cohesion repro still passes and the throwaway script was deleted.
deviations: The batch-6 checkpoint file already existed in a stale state and was overwritten with the current execution results.

T14 was already satisfied in the current worktree through the existing grouped-resize overlay path, so this batch verified the behavior with the full `ClipAction` test file instead of adding redundant `ClipAction.tsx` UI code.

task_updates.executor_notes: Verified pinned-group members still expose no clip-local resize affordances. Resize remains on the shot-group overlay path, and the full `ClipAction.test.tsx` module passed.

Removed the remaining legacy clip-to-group track-sync helper and migrated the surviving track-move callers to `moveGroup`-based group mutations. Verified the deleted cohesion symbols are no longer referenced under `src/tools/video-editor`, and the full track-management, multi-drag, and shot-group test files passed.

Verified the existing test files named in T16 against the current pinned-group model. The current worktree already covers `start`/`children` shape expectations, `moveGroup` routing for grouped drags and track moves, single `GroupDragEntry`, overlay-owned group resize handles, external-drop child ordering, resolve-overlap extent usage, and grouped delete/split keyboard no-op coverage in the existing `useClipEditing.test.ts` file rather than a new keyboard-only test file. The full T16 module suite passed on rerun.

Ran the validation sequence in order: the dedicated projection and cohesion modules passed, the updated existing regression set passed, `npx tsc --noEmit` passed, and the full `src/tools/video-editor/` Vitest suite passed in this worktree. The full-suite run emitted only non-failing diagnostics already seen earlier: `repairConfig` info logs, the `ClipAction.test.tsx` React `act(...)` warning, the `TimelineCanvas.test.tsx` `[PERF] render-storm` diagnostic, and expected `DynamicEffectRegistry.test.tsx` thrown-error stderr from its error-path assertions. Added a short temporary repro script that loaded a legacy pinned group through `buildDataFromCurrentRegistry`, then exercised `moveGroup`, `resizeGroupEdge`, and `replaceGroupChildren`; it confirmed cohesion held throughout and was deleted after the successful run.

Ran the project's existing test entrypoint with `npm test`, which executes `check:no-smoke-tests` and the full Vitest suite. The run completed with repo-wide failures outside the video-editor refactor surface: 25 failed suites / 52 failed tests / 824 passed suites. The failures were concentrated in unrelated areas such as missing imports (`src/moduleImportCoverage.test.ts`, `src/shared/editMedia/navigation.test.ts`, `src/shared/components/__tests__/HoverScrubVideo.test.tsx`, `src/shared/components/__tests__/LineageGifModal.test.tsx`, `src/shared/components/ui/touchableTooltip.test.tsx`, `src/shared/hooks/__tests__/useResources.test.ts`, `src/shared/hooks/projects/services/projectSetupRepository.test.ts`, `src/shared/hooks/projects/services/projectSetupService.test.ts`) and expectation mismatches in shared/integrations/character-animate/image-editing/travel-between-images tests. No new video-editor regressions were surfaced by this batch. Per the final-verification requirement, reran a throwaway pinned-group repro script against `buildDataFromCurrentRegistry`, `moveGroup`, `resizeGroupEdge`, and `replaceGroupChildren`; it passed and was deleted.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed per-clip resize handles remain absent for pinned-group members; resize lives on the shot-group overlay path and `ClipAction.test.tsx` passes.
Confirmed the listed dead cohesion symbols are gone from `src/tools/video-editor`, and the remaining track-move callers now reroute grouped clips through `moveGroup` instead of legacy helper logic.

Confirmed all listed updated test modules compile and pass together, and the grouped-member keyboard delete/split no-op coverage lives in the existing `useClipEditing.test.ts` file rather than a new test file.

`npx tsc --noEmit` passed, the full `src/tools/video-editor/` Vitest suite passed in this worktree, and the throwaway repro script confirmed cohesion held across legacy migration, drag, resize, and sync-style child replacement. The temporary script was deleted after the successful run.

The project-wide verification suite did not pass: `npm test` completed with 25 failed suites / 52 failed tests outside the video-editor refactor surface. No new video-editor regressions were found in this batch, and the final throwaway pinned-group repro still passed before the script was deleted.
